title: STAEDTLER 4320 MC10 Stick Rainbow Ballpoint Pen - Assorted Colours (Pack of 10)
features: Rainbow stick ballpoint pen with triangular barrel for relaxed and easy writing
Perfect for writing notes both in the office and at school
1.0mm ball diameter for a medium line width
Pack of 10 ballpoint pens in assorted rainbow colours
description: From the manufacturer Excellent writing comfort The ergonomic triangular pen shape fits perfectly in the hand even when writing or drawing for longer periods of time. The triangular barrel ensures a natural, relaxed posture and fatigue-free writing. Ballpoint tip STAEDTLER's 4320 M pen has a ~1.0 mm ball diameter for a medium line width, making it ideal for notetaking in school and the office. Smooth writing experience STAEDTLER's 4320 M pen has a particularly smooth writing experience, gliding easily over paper as you write, which means no pressure needs to be applied. Rainbow colours STAEDTLER's 4320 M pen is available in 4 colours individually, and in a pack of 10 assorted colours.
